mapper.select: SELECT M.CI, M.DI, CASE WHEN M.DI IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DI_STATUS, M.ROLE, M.USR_ID, M.PRIV_YN, TO_CHAR(M.PRIV_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS PRIV_DTTM, M.QUAN_YN, M.QUAL_YN, M.DISQ_YN_1, M.DISQ_UNIV_CD_1, M.DISQ_YN_2, M.DISQ_UNIV_CD_2, M.NAME, M.GENDER, M.TEL_HP, M.TEL_HOME, M.BIRTHDAY, M.ADDR_HOME_ZIPCODE, M.ADDR_HOME, M.ADDR_HOME_DETAIL, M.UNIV_CD, (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_CD = M.UNIV_CD) AS UNIV_NM, M.POSITION, M.DEPT, M.EMAIL, M.ADDR_JOB_ZIPCODE, M.ADDR_JOB, M.ADDR_JOB_DETAIL, M.TEL_JOB, M.RESUME_1, M.RESUME_2, M.UNIV_DIV, CASE WHEN M.UNIV_DIV IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_TYPE_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_TYPE_CD = M.UNIV_DIV) ELSE NULL END AS UNIV_DIV_NM, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(M.JOB_CD) = '1' THEN '교수' WHEN TO_CHAR(M.JOB_CD) = '2' THEN '교직원' ELSE '기타' END AS JOB_TITLE, M.UNIV_DIV, M.CTPV_CD, M.DEL_YN, EC1.CODE_NM AS A_UNIV, A.MAJOR AS A_MAJOR, EC2.CODE_NM AS B_UNIV, B.MAJOR AS B_MAJOR, EC3.CODE_NM AS C_UNIV, C.MAJOR AS C_MAJOR, M.INPT_ID, M.INPT_DT, M.LAST_CHNRG_ID, M.LAST_CHG_DT, M.FILE_ID, (SELECT ORG_FILE_NAME FROM EVA_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = M.FILE_ID AND FILE_SEQ = '0001') FILE_NM FROM EVA_POOL_M M LEFT JOIN EVA_POOL_DEGREE A ON M.USR_ID = A.USR_ID AND A.SEQ = 1 LEFT JOIN EVA_POOL_DEGREE B ON M.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.SEQ = 2 LEFT JOIN EVA_POOL_DEGREE C ON M.USR_ID = C.USR_ID AND C.SEQ = 3 LEFT JOIN eva_code EC1 ON A.UNIV_CD = EC1.org_cd AND EC1.group_cd = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' LEFT JOIN eva_code EC2 ON B.UNIV_CD = EC2.org_cd AND EC2.group_cd = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' LEFT JOIN eva_code EC3 ON C.UNIV_CD = EC3.org_cd AND EC3.group_cd = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' WHERE M.USR_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY M.NAME, M.USR_ID

SELECT A.DI, A.ROLE, A.USR_ID, A.PRIV_YN,
A.QUAN_YN, A.QUAL_YN, A.DISQ_YN_1, A.DISQ_UNIV_CD_1, A.DISQ_YN_2, A.DISQ_UNIV_CD_2, A.NAME, A.GENDER, A.TEL_HP, A.TEL_HOME, A.BIRTHDAY, A.ADDR_HOME_ZIPCODE, A.ADDR_HOME, A.ADDR_HOME_DETAIL, A.UNIV_CD, (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_CD = A.UNIV_CD) AS UNIV_CD_NM, A.JOB_NM, A.POSITION, A.DEPT, A.EMAIL, A.ADDR_JOB_ZIPCODE, A.ADDR_JOB, A.ADDR_JOB_DETAIL, A.TEL_JOB, A.RESUME_1, A.RESUME_2, A.EDU_DIV, A.JOB_CD, A.UNIV_DIV, CASE WHEN A.UNIV_DIV IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_TYPE_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_TYPE_CD = A.UNIV_DIV) ELSE NULL END AS UNIV_DIV_NM, A.CTPV_CD, CASE WHEN A.CTPV_CD IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT DISTINCT CTPV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE CTPV_CD = A.CTPV_CD) ELSE NULL END AS CTPV_CD_NM, A.DEL_YN, A.INPT_ID, A.INPT_DT, A.LAST_CHNRG_ID, A.LAST_CHG_DT FROM EVA_POOL_M A WHERE A.USR_ID = #{usrId}

SELECT epd.DI, epd.USR_ID, epd.SEQ, epd.EDU_YM, epd.UNIV_CD, ec.CODE_NM AS UNIV_NM, -- eva_code 테이블에서 가져온 CODE_NM epd.LOC_CD, epd.LOC_CD_NM, epd.DEG_CD, epd.DEG_CD_NM, epd.MAJOR, epd.DEL_YN FROM EVA_POOL_DEGREE epd LEFT JOIN eva_code ec ON epd.UNIV_CD = ec.org_cd AND ec.group_cd = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' WHERE epd.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND (epd.DEL_YN IS NULL OR epd.DEL_YN != 'Y') ORDER BY epd.DEG_CD

SELECT eft.DI, eft.USR_ID, eft.SEQ, eft.JOB_ST_YM, eft.JOB_ED_YM, eft.UNIV_CD, ec.CODE_NM AS UNIV_NM, -- 대학명은 eva_code 테이블에서 가져온다 eft.DEPT, eft.DEL_YN FROM EVA_POOL_FULLTIME_TEACHER eft LEFT JOIN eva_code ec ON eft.UNIV_CD = ec.org_cd AND ec.group_cd = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' -- 조건에 맞는 테이블 조인 WHERE eft.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND (eft.DEL_YN IS NULL OR eft.DEL_YN != 'Y') ORDER BY eft.JOB_ST_YM, eft.JOB_ED_YM, eft.SEQ

SELECT A.PERIOD_DIV_CD , A.EVA_YEAR , A.POOL_CD , A.USR_ID , A.DISQ_DIV , A.SEQ , A.DISQ_UNIV_CD , B.UNIV_NM DISQ_UNIV_NM , A.INPT_ID , A.INPT_DT FROM EVA_POOL_DISQ_UNIV A , (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_CD, UNIV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M) B WHERE A.DISQ_UNIV_CD = B.UNIV_CD AND A.PERIOD_DIV_CD = #{periodDivCd} AND A.EVA_YEAR = #{evaYear} AND A.POOL_CD = #{poolCd} AND A.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND A.DISQ_DIV = #{disq_div} ORDER BY A.SEQ

SELECT * FROM EVA_POOL_M M WHERE M.PRIV_YN = 'Y' -- 개인정보 동의한 사용자만 AND M.DEL_YN = 'N' -- 삭제 대상이 아닌 사용자만 AND (M.PRIV_DTTM + INTERVAL '2' YEAR) <= SYSDATE + INTERVAL '15' DAY -- 15일 이내 만료 예정 AND (M.PRIV_DTTM + INTERVAL '2' YEAR) > SYSDATE -- 이미 만료되지 않은 사용자 ORDER BY (M.PRIV_DTTM + INTERVAL '2' YEAR) ASC -- 만료일 기준 정렬
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM EVA_POOL_M WHERE PRIV_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND DI IS NOT NULL AND ADD_MONTHS(PRIV_DTTM, 24) < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT NAME, USR_ID FROM EVA_POOL_M WHERE PRIV_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND DI IS NOT NULL AND ADD_MONTHS(PRIV_DTTM, 24) < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVA_POOL_M_DEL (DEL_SEQ, NAME, USR_ID, RMRK, DEL_DT) VALUES (EVA_POOL_M_DEL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{NAME}, #{USR_ID}, '개인정보 파기', SYSDATE)
